member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.ApiV1Controller.GetPracticeAsync
member.remarks:
Returns general information (name, address, hours of operation) about the practice and each site.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://64.25.128.238/api/v1/GetPractice"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.response: Practice and site information is returned

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.ApiV1Controller.GetProviderAsync(System.Int32)
member.remarks:
Returns a single provider by id.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://64.25.128.238/api/v1/GetProvider?providerId=2"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.ApiV1Controller.GetProvidersAsync(System.Boolean)
member.remarks:
Returns all providers
Examplecurl -X GET "https://64.25.128.238/api/v1/GetProviders?includeInactive=true"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.response: A list of providers is returned
member.param: If true, inactive providers are included

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.ApiV1Controller.GetPatientAsync(System.Int32)
member.remarks:
Returns a single patient by id.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://64.25.128.238/api/v1/GetPatient?patientId=22"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.response: If exists, the patient record is returned, otherwise null

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.ApiV1Controller.GetUpdatedPatientsAsync(System.DateTime)
member.remarks:
Returns patients that have been created/updated since cutoffDate.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://64.25.128.238/api/v1/GetUpdatedPatients?cutoffDate=2019-06-11"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.response: A list of patients is returned

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.ApiV1Controller.FindPatientAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Boolean)
member.remarks:
Search for a patient.
At least one of email, homePhone, mobilePhone, email, or birthDate are required.
Returns a single patient record. If existing record is not found, a new one can be created.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://64.25.128.238/api/v1/FindPatient?
firstName=Test&lastName=ExamplePatient&email=examplepatient%40email.com&createIfNotExists=true"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.param: Create a new record if a match is not found

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.ApiV1Controller.CalculatePatientBatchesAsync(System.Int32)
member.remarks:
Calculates the id range pairs required to retrieve all patient records in batches.
Returns a list of id range pairs each with batchSize records between them, spanning the entire patient table.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://64.25.128.238/api/v1/CalculatePatientBatches?batchSize=30"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.param: How many records to return between each id range
member.response: A list of id pairs is returned

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.ApiV1Controller.GetPatientBatchAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.remarks:
Returns all patient records with id in the specified id range.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://64.25.128.238/api/v1/GetPatientBatch?fromId=1&toId=27"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.param: The smallest id in the batch (inclusive)
The largest id in the batch (inclusive)
If true, inactive patients are included
member.response: A list of patients is returned

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.ApiV1Controller.FindAppointmentOpeningsAsync(System.DateTime,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.remarks:
Search for appointment openings on a particular day.
To filter out openings outside of the provider's block scheduling setup,
pass both a provider id and an appt id.
Returns a list of opening time slots.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://64.25.128.238/api/v1/FindAppointmentOpenings?
date=2019-06-07&interval=15&siteId=2&providerId=2&apptTypeId=8"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.param: The amount of time between each opening, in minutes
The id of the site to filter on
The id of the provider to filter on
The id of the appt type to filter on
member.response: A list of time slots is returned

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.ApiV1Controller.GetAppointmentStatusesAsync(System.Boolean)
member.remarks:
Returns all appointment statuses.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://64.25.128.238/api/v1/GetAppointmentStatuses"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.response: A list of appointment statuses is returned
member.param: If true, inactive appt statuses are included

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.ApiV1Controller.GetAppointmentTypesAsync(System.Boolean)
member.remarks:
Returns all appointment types.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://64.25.128.238/api/v1/GetAppointmentTypes"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.response: A list of appointment types is returned
member.param: If true, inactive appt types are included

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.ApiV1Controller.GetUpdatedAppointmentsAsync(System.DateTime,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.remarks:
Returns appointments that have been created/updated since cutoffDate.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://64.25.128.238/api/v1/GetUpdatedAppointments?cutoffDate=2019-06-06&siteId=2&providerId=1"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.response: A list of appointments is returned

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.ApiV1Controller.CreateAppointmentAsync(TIMS_X.Core.Models.Api.CreateAppointmentModel)
member.remarks:
Create a patient appointment.
Examplecurl -X PUT "https://64.25.128.238/api/v1/CreateAppointment"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key" -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json"
-d "{ \"patientId\": 2, \"appointmentTypeId\": 3, \"providerId\": 1, \"siteId\": 1, \"startsAt\": \"2019-06-28T09:30:00-06:00\", \"endsAt\": \"2019-06-28T10:00:00-06:00\"}"

member.name: T:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.CustomerController
member.summary: The customer controller provides API endpoints for querying the internal TIMS database for customers and vendor permissions

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.CustomerController.GetConnectionInfoAsync
member.summary: Retrieves the customer server IP address and database name

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.CustomerController.Ping
member.summary: Allows client to ensure it can reach this server.

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.CustomerController.ValidateCustomerAsync
member.summary: Tests a customer database connection. Returns true if it can connect, false otherwise.

member.name: T:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.InternalController
member.summary: This controller provides helper API endpoints for the Customer Portal

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.InternalController.SignOut
member.summary: This gets called when the user clicks on the sign out button in the navigation bar. It removes the browser cookie and redirects to the sign in screen

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.InternalController.ValidateApiUrl(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures api url is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.InternalController.ValidateDatabaseConnectionAsync(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures customer server/database combination is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.InternalController.ValidateCustomerDatabase(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures customer server/database combination is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.InternalController.ValidateCustomerOfficeCode(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures customer office code is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.InternalController.ValidateServerAddress(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures server ip address is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.InternalController.ValidateServerName(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures server name is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.InternalController.ValidateSupportUserEmail(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures support user email is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.InternalController.ValidateSupportUserName(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures support user name is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.InternalController.ValidateVendorApiKey(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures vendor api key is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.InternalController.ValidateVendorName(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures vendor name is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.InternalController.ValidateVendorPermissionName(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures vendor permission name is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.SchedulerController.GetPatientsScheduledAsync(System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.Int32[])
member.summary: Returns a list of all patients scheduled in the provided date range at the provided sites. If no sites (sid) are provided, all sites are queried.

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Data.TimsInternalDbContext.OnModelCreating(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder)
member.summary: Here we map all the tables out. In other db contexts, the mapping is done in ModelConfigurator.cs and shared among data services. Since we only ever need one db context to connect to TIMSInternal, the mapping is done here. The mapping was originally generated with the command "dotnet ef dbcontext scaffold" then copied over

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Extensions.FormattingExtensions.ToE164Format(System.String)
member.summary: Formats a phone number in E164 format; eg: 406-370-7959 --> +14063707959

member.name: T:TIMS_X.Server.Filters.ChangePasswordFilter
member.summary: This filter gets injected into the Http request pipeline and every request runs through it. It won't let the user continue until they change their password.

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Filters.ChangePasswordFilter.OnAuthorization(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.AuthorizationFilterContext)
member.summary: Checks if the user cookie contains claim "CP" (Change Password). If true, forces user to change password page.

member.name: T:TIMS_X.Server.Legacy.Noah.TestSide
member.summary: Side the audiogram should display on

member.summary: Static class for the audiogram constants

member.summary: This class gets inserted into the request pipeline and validates all requests that require an api key.

member.summary: Invoke the middleware on a request to require api key authentication

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioCallResponse.CallSid
member.summary: The id of the Call as provided by Twilio.

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioCallResponse.Digits
member.summary: The digits that the user pressed, including the termination symbol (*, #, etc...).

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioCallScriptRequest.CallSid
member.summary: The id of the Call as provided by Twilio.

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioSmsResponse.AccountSid
member.summary: The 34 character id of the Account this message is associated with.

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioSmsResponse.Body
member.summary: The text body of the SMS message. Up to 160 characters long.

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioSmsResponse.From
member.summary: The phone number that sent this message.

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioSmsResponse.SmsSid
member.summary: A 34 character unique identifier for the message. May be used to later retrieve this message from the REST API.

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioSmsResponse.To
member.summary: The phone number of the recipient.

member.summary: User is attempting to log in

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Queries.PatientQuery.CalculateBatchesAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Given a batch size n, this routine will return a list of Patient ID Pairs. Each ID Pair has n records between them, including themselves.

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Services.OpportunityTrackingService._IsAudiogramTestAboveThreshold(System.Int32,TIMS_X.Server.Legacy.Noah.TestSide,TIMS_X.Server.Legacy.Noah.AudiogramTestResults,TIMS_X.Core.Models.OpportunityTrackingRules)
member.summary: Gets if the audiogram is above the thresholds for the test

member.summary: Gets the actual frequency for a test

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Services.PatientMessagingService._HandlePatientNotificationResponseAsync(TIMS_X.Core.Enums.MessageDeliveryMethod,TIMS_X.Core.Enums.PatientNotificationResponse,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Responsible for parsing the patient's voice notification response and updating the associated appointment's status.
